author: ec2-user
text: Uncertain on exact API shape for per-registration Observe (struct? handle? correlation by token/Observe value?), precise transactional semantics for CON notifications (update replay only after ACK?), persistence format for registration state vs existing SSN NVM, and whether new test vectors needed in oscore.json for 4.1.3.5/7.4.1 or extend existing. Recommendation: define Registration struct in oscore.h with replay_window per-reg, separate from context. Need spec clarification in draft-lichen-security or coap doc before coding.
